name: backend-registry-mcp-integration
description: Wire PostgresBackend into MCP via backend registry. Connection implicit via x-persistence.backend schema metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: MCP server creates PostgresBackend instance when db.connect establishes connection
PostgresBackend registered in backendRegistry under 'postgres' key
store.list and store.query tools resolve backend via x-persistence.backend schema extension
When x-persistence.backend='postgres', queries execute via PostgresBackend instead of in-memory
When x-persistence.backend='file' or unset, existing FileSystemPersistence behavior unchanged
Backend resolution cascade: model -> schema -> registry default
Integration test verifies postgres-backed collection query returns database results
